violations.text: The ice cream freezers were observed with an accumulation of ice build-up. Establishment is to run a defrost on freezers. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
Condensate pipe was observed in the hand sink. Per PIC, condensate pipe in not in use. Establishment is to remove pipe or re-locate pipe to an approved area. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/22/2025
The hand sink located in the restroom, was observed to have a condensate pipe draining directly into sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2024
Chemicals (antifreeze, lighter fluid) were stored above cookies on retail shelving. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice cream freezers have an accumulation of frost buildup. New Violation. Correct By: 07/26/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2024
